title: Niko's RPG
description: Discover epic RPG adventures in Minecraft. Fight, quest, and explore in this meticulously crafted modpack. Your adventure begins!
body:
# Niko's RPG Modpack: Explore a World of Adventure

Welcome to Niko's RPG Modpack, an exhilarating expansion of the Minecraft world that brings the adventure, combat, and strategy of RPG to the game we all love. This vast and captivating universe is a careful creation of the Niko's RPG modpack, where you have the freedom to interact with other players, build epic bases, or choose a peaceful lifestyle in the remote parts of the map. This is your world to discover, conquer, and protect.

## About the Modpack
The Niko's RPG Modpack is a unique experience that transforms Minecraft into a true RPG. Within this modpack, you'll find an ecosystem of modifications that elevate the gaming experience to a new level. Get ready to face challenges from powerful monsters, explore scenic landscapes, and charming villages, and forge alliances with other players in search of glory and adventure.

## Why choose Niko's RPG
- Battle focused movementation
- Big nicely generated worlds
- Grinding and fun focused
- Bounty system

## Minimum Requirements
To fully enjoy the Niko's RPG Modpack, make sure your computer meets the following minimum requirements:
- Processor: Intel Core i5 6th generation or higher
- RAM: At least 4GB

> This requirements are not exact (it's just my config when i did the modpack). If your computer doesn't meet these requirements, you can still try the modpack and venture into this amazing world.

## FAQ?
### Forge version when?
Never. I can't' work with Forge on my computer and part of the mods of this modpack are not disponible for Forge.

### Where's mod "X"?
You can suggest mods on the [discord]() and there's some mods i tried to add but can't. here are some of they and the reason why they are not on the modpack:
- epic fight (forge only)
- physics mod (performance problems)
- l_ender_cataclism (also forge only)
- immersive portal (incompatibility)

### Is this gonna be on Curseforge?
Yes, Someday.

### Source code on Github?
Not avaliable for now, but coming soon.

### More versions?
Maybe, i don't have much time to work on it but i can try.

Now that you're ready to embark on your journey, choose your path, face challenges, or enjoy a peaceful life. Join the fun and showcase your skills in the Niko's RPG Modpack!
